source_of_truth: Secrets resolve from a central secrets manager at runtime. This committed file documents provider shape only.

env.purpose: Offline CI and platform-injected runtime values only; do not commit real .env files.

azure_key_vault.purpose: Recommended Azure adapter example; disabled unless a project explicitly configures it.

hashicorp_vault.purpose: Central Vault manager shape; project adapters must be explicitly configured outside offline CI.

aws_secrets_manager.purpose: AWS Secrets Manager shape; project adapters must be explicitly configured outside offline CI.

gcp_secret_manager.purpose: GCP Secret Manager shape; project adapters must be explicitly configured outside offline CI.

onepassword_doppler.purpose: Team-managed secret platform shape; do not sync real .env files into the repository.

os_keyring.purpose: Local development only; not for shared, CI, production, deployment, or external writes.

rules: Use managed identity, workload identity, OIDC, OAuth, or short-lived tokens.
Use OS keyring for local development only.
Do not make cloud providers required for offline CI.
